faq.question: How do I return a damaged or unwanted product?
faq.answer: Your product is eligible for return within 30 days. Please upload product images and your order ID.

faq.question: How do I reset my password?
faq.answer: You can reset your password using the Forgot Password option on the login page.

faq.question: How do I track my order?
faq.answer: You can track your order using the tracking number sent to your email.

faq.question: What do I do if my payment fails?
faq.answer: It looks like your payment failed. Please verify your card details or try another payment method.

faq.question: How do I change my email address?
faq.answer: Go to Account Settings > Profile > Email, enter your new address, and confirm it via the verification link we send you.

faq.question: My account is locked, how do I unlock it?
faq.answer: Accounts lock after repeated failed logins. Use the Forgot Password link to reset your credentials and automatically unlock your account.

faq.question: The website crashes or errors when I try to log in
faq.answer: Try clearing your browser cache/cookies or logging in from a private/incognito window. If the crash continues, let us know your browser and device so we can investigate further.

faq.question: Greeting
faq.answer: Hi! I'm your AI support assistant. I can help with orders, billing, account access, and technical issues — what do you need help with?

company_info.name: SupportAI
company_info.escalation_policy: If a user is angry or their issue is not resolved after 2 attempts, escalate to a human agent.
